variants: Eoghan McCauley, an inventor and writer, grew up in Silverpine Crossing and now enjoys life in Greengate Inlet. He is best known for his invention, the Candlewick Signal Lattice, which helped him earn the prestigious Candledusk Citation. Beyond his professional accolades, Eoghan also embraces his creative side as a member of the Sunfield Kitewright Assembly, where he collaborates with others in the art of kite design. His journey reflects his commitment to both innovation and community.

He embodies a seamless integration of creativity and engineering in his life.
